title: Shipping
description: Commerce v1 shipping contract for shipping eligibility, COD eligibility, ETA, tracking, and shipping fee boundaries.
$comment: Sources: TECH-04 Shipping Eligibility state model. Missing address blocks draft/order; non-eligible shipping blocks official order. TODO: source documents do not lock carrier/tracking payload shape.

order_draft_id.description: Order draft if shipping is checked before official order.

eligible.description: Whether shipping is eligible for the address/order.

cod_eligible.description: Whether COD is allowed for this shipping context.

carrier.description: Carrier or shipping method. TODO: define official carrier/method enum from source docs.

tracking_url.description: Tracking URL if safe to expose.

block_reason.description: Reason shipping is blocked or unavailable.
